title: XySpeeder Corp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''XySpeeder Corp''' was the manufacturer of upgrade replacement parts and racing speeders such as the [[Xy-2 Aircoupe racing airspeeder|Xy-2 Aircoupe Racing Airspeeder]]. The company sponsored [[Zag Tefilous]] in the speeder races of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-12-11 -->''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''
